titleStmt.title: SII 28.136: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 136. (A.R. No. 291 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, north wall.

This record is unfinished. However, the main content of the inscription is available. It records that Tēvaṅguḍaiyāṉ Nambaṉ Tiruvaiyāṟuḍaiyāṉ Chembiyaṉ Taraṇi-vēḷāṉ paid 15 kaḻañju of gold for purchasing as kāṇi (lease) in favour of himself and his descendants (vaṟgattār), 22(1/2) vēli of land called in Kumāranallūr in Kiḻ-puḷiyūr-nāḍu and Vēśālippāḍi and attached ūrs (ivvūrōḍum-kūḍi-iṟukkiṟa) in Vēḷāppaḍi. The erstwhile leaseholders (kāṇi-āḷar) and variśai-āḷar were removed from the land which consisted of cultivated land, kollai (kitchen-garden land), irrigation facilities (nīrnilai) as also land in higher ground and lower ground. Apparently he had to reclaim the land in entirety and contribute the dues in respect of that land to the temple, as it was in the name of Piḷḷaiyār Chaṇḍēśvaradēvar (secretary of the main deity), that the order for the sale had been given with the endorsement by the mūlaparushaiyār, who issued the niyōgam in respect of this transaction.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī § tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu nāṟpattāṟāvatu ciṅka nāyaṟṟu tiyati 2 10 2ṉāl tevaṅkuṭaiyāṉ nampaṉ tiruvaiyāṟuṭai
yāṉ cempiyaṉ taraṇiveḷāṉ vilai koṇṭa tevatāṉam vecālippāṭik kiḻpuliyūr nāṭṭu kumāranallūrilum Ivvūroṭum kūṭi Iṟukkiṟa Ūrkaḷilum veḷāpāṭi yeṉṟu
perkūvappaṭṭa nilattiṉukkellai nivāveṉṉumāṟṟukkum kārimaṅkalattu Ellaikku vaṭakkum maṇikumāramaṅkalattu Ellaikku koppāṭi Uṭaiyāṉ vāykkālukkut teṟkum te
ṉṉāṟṟāṉa Ellaikku meṟkumIt is noteworthy that eastern boundary of the land is not mentioned.Āka Ivvicaitta Iṉṉāṉkellaiyilum Akappaṭṭa viḷainilamum kollaiyum nirnilaiyum Uḷpaṭa Uḷḷaṭaṅka vanta Iṉṉilamuṟṟum Oḻiviṉṟi vanta
nilam Irupattiraṇṭairaiyum muṉpu kāṇi Āḷarum varicai Āḷarum Iṉṟi meṭuntāḻvum payir ceṉṟatum cellātatumāy Eṟa muṉpu Uṭal kaṇṭatum Iṟuttu vantamaiyil muṟ kuṟitta
nilam Irupattiraṇṭaraikkum vilaiyāka śrīpaṇṭārattile patiṉkaḻañcu poṉ Oṭukki taṉakkum taṉ vaṟkattāṟkum kāṇiyāka koḷḷaveṉṟu piḷḷaiyār caṇḍeśvaradevar
prasādañ ceytaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭiyum mulaparuṣaiyār niyogappaṭiyuṅ koṇṭu patiṉ kaḻañcu poṉṉum Oṭukki Ippoṉ patiṉ kaḻañcum tiThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 28.136 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
